parsing_res_list.block_content: It has long been 1acknowledged that there may be differences in language usage between men and women:quite extreme in languages other than English
Lakoff (1975)identified extensive differences Sr not just in grammar and lexis,but in aspects of style,register,and (especially in dialogues)dynamic roles
Studies have adapted to the broader social agenda:early theories relating to power relationships between sexes (Lakoff)now giving way to view that there is a cultural difference (Tannen)
We'll look at this issue in more detail later

core_content.markdown:
## Gender 

It has long been 1acknowledged that there may be differences in language usage between men and women:quite extreme in languages other than English 



Lakoff (1975)identified extensive differences Sr not just in grammar and lexis,but in aspects of style,register,and (especially in dialogues)dynamic roles 

Studies have adapted to the broader social agenda:early theories relating to power relationships between sexes (Lakoff)now giving way to view that there is a cultural difference (Tannen)

We'll look at this issue in more detail later
